per_scenario.one_line_critique: Correctly identifies lack of context, but the tone is generic and it offers three options instead of one sharp direction.
The agent entered a catastrophic runaway loop, repeating the same tool call and filler text 25 times without ever providing an answer.
The agent entered a catastrophic runaway loop, repeating identical queries and filler text 25 times without ever creating the requested dashboard.
The agent failed completely, entering a runaway loop of redundant preambles and tool calls without ever providing the answer present in the data.
